figures.caption: Fig. 3. DT partition at N = 10: 77 critical regions. The region count grows as more nodes bring new active-set combinations.

Fig. 1. CT critical-region partition of Θ = [−2.6, 2.6] × [−0.9, 0.9] × [−0.7, 0.7]. Cube faces are colored by critical region; black lines are crosssections of the four hyperplanes (15)–(18). Straight edges on every face confirm the endpoint condition of Proposition 1.
